async (
    _event: H3Event,
    effectiveSitemap: SitemapDefinition,
    matchName: string,
    isChunked: boolean,
    resolvers: NitroUrlResolvers,
    runtimeConfig: ModuleRuntimeConfig,
    nitro?: NitroApp,
  ) => buildResolvedSitemapUrls(effectiveSitemap, matchName, isChunked, resolvers, runtimeConfig, nitro)
